question: What are the id, name and membership level of visitors who have spent the largest amount of money in total in all museum tickets?
gold_sql: SELECT t2.visitor_id ,  t1.name ,  t1.Level_of_membership FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id GROUP BY t2.visitor_id ORDER BY sum(t2.Total_spent) DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.col_1, T2.col_2, T2.col_3 FROM table_2 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.col_1 = T3.col_2 GROUP BY T2.col_1 ORDER BY SUM(T3.col_4) DESC LIMIT 1
raw_response: SELECT T2.col_1, T2.col_2, T2.col_3 FROM table_2 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.col_1 = T3.col_2 GROUP BY T2.col_1 ORDER BY SUM(T3.col_4) DESC LIMIT 1
